Article Title: Abhishek Sharma: IPL 2026: Abhishek runs riot again! Opener's ton seals SRH’s 47-run hammering of DC
Article Text:
Sunrisers Hyderabad's Abhishek Sharma and Heinrich Klaasen. (ANI Photo)

Watch Ashok Sharma story: Inside the village and house which shaped India's new pace sensation Ashok Sharma story: Inside the village and house which shaped India's new pace sensation

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

135 - Abhishek Sharma recorded his second hundred in the IPL. His highest is 141 vs Punjab Kings in Hyderabad on April 12, 2025. He is the first batter to post two innings of 135+ in the IPL.

3 - Abhishek Sharma is the third Sunrisers’ batter to hit two IPL hundreds, joining David Warner and Heinrich Klaasen.

9 - With his ninth hundred in 184 innings, Abhishek has emulated an Indian record for most tons in T20s, held by Virat Kohli — 9 in 403 innings. The top-three batters with most tons in T20s are Chris Gayle (22), Babar Azam (12) and David Warner (10).

HYDERABAD: Explosive opener Abhishek Sharma blasted his second IPL century, an unbeaten 135 (68b; 10x4, 10x6), while Eshan Malinga (4/32) produced another impressive performance as Sunrisers Hyderabad crushed Delhi Capitals by 47 runs to record their third straight win and fourth overall in the Indian Premier League on Tuesday.Abhishek was at his destructive best, powering the hosts to 242/2, their fifth total of 200 or more this season. He added 97 for the opening wicket with Travis Head (37; 26b, 2x4, 2x6), 79 for the second wicket with Ishan Kishan (25; 13b, 2x4, 1x6) and an unbroken 66 for the third with Heinrich Klaasen (37*; 13b, 3x4, 3x6). The hosts then restricted Capitals to 195/9.Dilshan Madushanka struck on debut to dismiss Pathum Nissanka (6) in his second over. KL Rahul, dropped on 14 by Malinga in his follow through, and Nitish Rana took Capitals to 59/1 in the powerplay.Rana then hit Shivang Kumar for 19 runs in the eighth over to reach his half-century in 27 deliveries. But Sakib Hussain ended the 86-run second-wicket stand by removing Rahul (37; 23b, 2x4, 3x6) as the visitors reached 107/2 at the halfway stage.Malinga then turned the game with back-to-back wickets. He first removed Rana (57; 30b, 7x4, 3x6), caught at long-on, and then bowled the dangerous David Miller for nought to reduce the visitors to 107/4.Sameer Rizvi (41; 28b, 2x4, 2x6) and Tristan Stubbs (27; 16b, 3x4, 1x6) added 59 for the fifth wicket but Malinga struck again. He dismissed Stubbs in the 16th over and Ashutosh Sharma in the 18th. Harsh Dubey (3/12) capped a perfect evening for the hosts by striking thrice in the final over.Earlier, asked to bat, Abhishek and Head took SRH to 67/0 in the powerplay. Abhishek survived a run-out chance going for a risky second run as KL Rahul failed to gather the ball cleanly and reached his half-century in 25 balls. He celebrated it with another straight six off Axar, but Head holed out in the same over.Kishan took on Kuldeep Yadav for two boundaries and a six as 22 came off the over. Abhishek got another reprieve when Rana dropped him on 86 at deep backward point in the 14th over off T Natarajan. He made Capitals pay by hitting Rana for consecutive sixes on the way to a century off 47 balls.
Article Summary: Abhishek Sharma hits unbeaten 135 as Sunrisers Hyderabad beat Delhi Capitals by 47 runs. Sharma is the first batter to post two innings of 135+ in the IPL. Hosts record their third straight win and fourth overall in the Indian Premier League.

Article Title: Ravichandran Ashwin: 'Why go to a part-timer?' Ashwin slams Axar Patel’s captaincy after DC's defeat to SRH
Article Text:
Ashwin takes a dig at Axar's captaincy (Screengrab/X)

Watch Venugopal Rao explains the key decisions which helped DC beat RCB Venugopal Rao explains the key decisions which helped DC beat RCB

Ashwin Questions Key Tactical Call

Delhi Capitals conceded their highest total of IPL 2026, 242 runs, powered by a sensational unbeaten 135 from Abhishek Sharma , who batted through the entire 20 overs. Following the defeat, former India cricketer Ravichandran Ashwin criticised skipper Axar Patel for questionable decisions during the match.Sunrisers Hyderabad continued their strong run with a commanding 47-run win, driven by Abhishek’s 68-ball masterclass, which included 10 fours and 10 sixes. He was well supported by Travis Head (37) and Heinrich Klaasen (37* off 13), helping SRH post a daunting 242/2.In reply, Delhi Capitals showed early promise through a partnership between KL Rahul (37) and Nitish Rana (57), but lost momentum after their dismissals. Eshan Malinga starred with the ball, picking up 4/32, as DC were restricted to 195/9.Ashwin took particular issue with Delhi’s bowling strategy, highlighting the overuse of part-time bowler Nitish Rana. Rana bowled his full quota of four overs, conceding 55 runs, while frontline spinners Kuldeep Yadav and Axar Patel bowled just two overs each.Kuldeep returned figures of 1/23 in his two overs, while Axar conceded 30 runs without taking a wicket.“In DC's bowling attack, they have Axar Patel, Kuldeep, Lungi, Mukesh, and Natarajan. But the first player to complete his 4-over quota was Nitish Rana, and that's where they lost the match. It has to be the biggest blunder so far,” Ashwin said on his YouTube channel Ash Ki Baat.Ashwin further questioned the logic behind relying on a part-time option despite having a full set of specialist bowlers.“Conceding 50 runs in four overs is not a big deal, but if you have five regular bowlers, why did you go for a part-timer?” he added.The loss pushed Delhi Capitals down to fifth place in the standings, while Sunrisers Hyderabad climbed to third, continuing their upward momentum in IPL 2026.
Article Summary: Ravichandran Ashwin takes a dig at Axar Patel's captaincy. Delhi Capitals conceded their highest total of IPL 2026, 242 runs. Abhishek Sharma scored an unbeaten 135 for Sunrisers Hyderabad.

Article Title: Jude Bellingham: Jude Bellingham invests in cricket, buys stake in The Hundred's Birmingham Phoenix
Article Text:
Real Madrid mid-fielder Jude Bellingham (Photo: Real Madrid)

Watch Matthew Hayden reacts after Gujarat Titans’ defeat to Mumbai Indians Matthew Hayden reacts after Gujarat Titans’ defeat to Mumbai Indians

A Personal and Strategic Move

England and Real Madrid midfielder Jude Bellingham is set to make his foray into cricket ownership by purchasing a stake in The Hundred franchise Birmingham Phoenix. The 22-year-old is expected to formally announce the move this week, having acquired approximately a one per cent stake in the franchise. The investment marks a unique crossover between football and cricket, with Bellingham known to be a long-time fan of the sport.The Birmingham Phoenix franchise was valued at around £82 million (Rs 10,36,76,61,800) during The Hundred’s recent investment round. In 2025, American investment firm Knighthead Capital acquired a 49 per cent stake, while Warwickshire County Cricket Club retained the remaining 51 per cent as the host county at Edgbaston. Bellingham’s minority investment is understood to come from a combination of existing shares, making him one of the newest stakeholders in the franchise.According to The Telegraph, Jude is now expected to announce that he has bought 0.6 per cent of Warwickshire’s stake, and 0.6 per cent of Knighthood’s stake. Based on figures from the auction, his investment would be worth around £1m (Rs 12,64,70,000). The deal was first reported by The Cricketer, and is expected to be announced officially on Wednesday.It is unclear exactly how the deal came about, but Bellingham’s potential involvement was flagged by Warwickshire and Knighthead to the ECB more than a year ago, which allowed them to sell a stake on.Bellingham’s investment is not just financial but also personal. Having grown up in the Midlands and started his football journey with Birmingham City, his association with the Birmingham-based franchise adds a strong local connection. Bellingham played for Hagley Cricket Club in nearby Worcestershire as a child and has retained an interest in the game.Post-deal, Warwickshire continue to hold a majority 50.4% stake in Birmingham Phoenix, with Knighthead owning 48.4%. The squad will feature key names such as men’s captain Jacob Bethell and Ellyse Perry, supported by rising English stars Alice Capsey and Davina Perrin.Bellingham’s move highlights the increasing commercial appeal of franchise cricket. The Hundred, launched by the England and Wales Cricket Board (ECB), continues to attract global investors and attention as it aims to expand the sport’s audience.
Article Summary: Jude Bellingham is set to make his foray into cricket ownership by purchasing a stake in The Hundred franchise Birmingham Phoenix. The 22-year-old is expected to formally announce the move this week, having acquired approximately a one per cent stake in the franchise. The investment marks a unique crossover between football and cricket.

Article Title: Yesterday Match Result: Abhishek Sharma’s 135 powers Sunrisers Hyderabad rout of Delhi Capitals
Article Text:
Sunrisers Hyderabad's Abhishek Sharma celebrates his century. (ANI Photo)

Watch Matthew Hayden reacts after Gujarat Titans’ defeat to Mumbai Indians Matthew Hayden reacts after Gujarat Titans’ defeat to Mumbai Indians

Malinga’s four-for derails Delhi Capitals chase

All eyes on Lucknow as LSG host RR

Sunrisers Hyderabad rode on a blistering unbeaten 135 from Abhishek Sharma to crush Delhi Capitals by 47 runs in a high-scoring IPL 2026 encounter in Hyderabad on Tuesday, continuing their surge up the points table.The swashbuckling left-hander produced one of the innings of the season, smashing 10 fours and 10 sixes in a 68-ball masterclass to propel SRH to a daunting 242/2 after being put in to bat. It marked his second IPL century and further cemented his position as one of the most destructive batters around.Abhishek set the tone early, stitching a 97-run opening stand with Travis Head (37) before accelerating through the middle overs. He found ideal support in Heinrich Klaasen, who hammered an unbeaten 37 off just 13 balls to finish the innings in style.“The way we started we had a plan, me and Heady wanted to make use of the powerplay,” Abhishek said. “But the wicket was slow, so we had to adjust and come up with different plans.”Delhi Capitals’ chase never truly gathered momentum despite a promising 86-run stand between KL Rahul (37) and Nitish Rana (57).Once the duo fell in quick succession, the visitors slipped behind the required rate.Sri Lankan pacer Eshan Malinga turned the game decisively with a superb spell of 4/32, including two wickets in two balls to dent Delhi’s middle order. Tristan Stubbs (27) and Sameer Rizvi (41) briefly revived hopes with a 59-run stand, but Malinga’s return ended any resistance as DC finished on 195/9.Delhi skipper Axar Patel acknowledged Abhishek’s brilliance, saying: “If someone bats that well… you cannot do anything. You have to move on.”The victory lifted SRH to third on the table with four wins in seven matches, while Delhi slipped to fifth.Attention now shifts to Lucknow, where Lucknow Super Giants host Rajasthan Royals at the Ekana Stadium on Wednesday. LSG will be searching for momentum, while RR arrive under pressure after back-to-back defeats, having begun their campaign with four consecutive wins.
Article Summary: Sunrisers Hyderabad beat Delhi Capitals by 47 runs in IPL 2026. Abhishek Sharma scores unbeaten 135 in SRH's 242-2. Eshan Malinga takes four-for for Delhi. Lucknow Super Giants host Rajasthan Royals on Wednesday.

Article Title: Neymar Injury: ‘Only a fit Neymar should be at the World Cup’: Cafu says it’s a race against time
Article Text:
Cafu with fans (Getty Images)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

ALSO READ:

MADRID: In a city that breathes football, Monday morning brought a feeling of nostalgia. Three legends of the game, Ruud Gullit, Luis Figo and Cafu, shared one stage inside the iconic Palacio de Cibeles at the Laureus World Sports Awards (LWSA) here.Nearly an hour ahead of schedule, the buzz in the room reflected the magnitude of the occasion with journalists from across the globe having filled every available seat. When Gullit, Figo and Cafu finally emerged, dressed casually, the trio looked as composed and fit as ever, greeting the crowd with easy smiles. The interaction ranged across topics from the upcoming World Cup to the Champions League final and the evolution of the modern game.Naturally, the conversation kicked-off to contenders for the next global crown this summer. And all three legends largely picked a similar group of favourites — France, Argentina, Brazil and Spain.Figo, widely regarded as one of the finest wingers of his generation, leaned on history and pedigree. “In terms of history, I always think of Brazil, Argentina, France and Spain,” the former Portugal captain said, while also backing his home nation, “I hope Portugal can compete and fight, but those teams have a longer track record.”Dutchman Gullit added the Netherlands to the list, saying the Dutch can’t be ignored with a strong footballing legacy.Attention soon shifted to individual stars, particularly Neymar jr and Cristiano Ronaldo — two icons facing uncertain roles ahead of the World Cup. Cafu was measured in his assessment of Neymar, placing fitness above sentiment. “If he is fit, he should be there. But only if he is fit — it’s a race against time,” he said, referring to the forward’s injury struggles. Neymar hasn’t played for the national team since suffering a knee injury in Oct 2023.Figo echoed a more assured stance on Ronaldo, backing his inclusion without hesitation. “Of course he deserves to be there. He has been a very successful player for Portugal. No doubt,” he stated.With the discussion veering towards the decline of Italy on the international stage, Gullit pointed to a loss of identity.“They forgot their DNA,” he remarked. “Italy was always built from defence. That’s how they won. Now they try to play a different football, and they lose what made them strong. They don’t have good strikers as well,” he said.The conversation also explored how football itself has transformed. From technology to player conditioning, the modern game bears little resemblance to the one these legends dominated. Gullit highlighted the impact of VAR and advancements in training, noting how players today enjoy longer careers and faster-paced matches.“The game becomes quicker every year,” he said, reflecting on improved pitches, athleticism and tactical shifts.“Where once physicality dominated, today’s game favours agility, intelligence and speed,” he added.As the session drew to a close, the focus shifted to club football and the anticipated Champions League final. Figo expressed strong belief in Paris Saint-Germain, citing their midfield strength as a decisive factor. Gullit, however, took a broader view, suggesting that the true final had already taken place between PSG and Bayern Munich in the semifinals — a clash of attacking philosophies and youthful energy.(The correspondent is in Madrid as a guest of Laureus World Sports Awards)
Article Summary: Ruud Gullit, Luis Figo and Cafu spoke at the Laureus World Sports Awards in Madrid. The three legends discussed the upcoming World Cup, Champions League final and evolution of the modern game. All three picked France, Argentina, Brazil and Spain as favourites for the tournament.

Article Title: Uneven playing field: How ISL's 'inequality' could cost clubs more than just points
Article Text:
At the time of writing, East Bengal have the best home record in the ISL this season. (Image: AIFF)

New Delhi:

Watch ISL commercial rights: AIFF get two different bids ISL commercial rights: AIFF get two different bids

Mohun Bagan Super Giant are top of the ISL standings. (AIFF)

Mohammedan Sporting, bottom of the ISL standings, have played just two home games this season. (AIFF)

The ongoing Indian Super League (ISL) season is into its ninth matchday with Mohun Bagan Super Giant top of the standings. They have Mumbai City FC, FC Goa, East Bengal FC, Bengaluru FC and Jamshedpur FC hot on their heels. At the other end, Mohammedan Sporting are in prime position to go down. But the league table only tells half the story.Mohammedan Sporting have played eight games so far and have one point to show for it - a draw against Odisha FC on April 17. Of the eight games, only two have come at home -- against FC Goa (0-2 on February 20) and Bengaluru FC (1-2 on March 7). Based on the current fixture list, by the end of the season, they would have played only three home games.While it doesn't need explaining, home advantage matters. Just ask the two other Bengal clubs. Of Mohun Bagan Super Giant's nine games and 20 points, five have been at home, earning them 12 points. East Bengal have played seven home games out of eight overall, pocketing 12 points out of 15 overall in the process.East Bengal's upcoming 'home' fixture, against Odisha FC, will be played in Goa due to elections in West Bengal. They will return to home base to face Punjab FC on May 11.In all, nine of East Bengal's 12 scheduled matches would have been played at home.The inequality isn't restricted to the ISL alone. Rajasthan United, who finished third in Stage 1 of the Indian Football League and boasted the best home record, will be denied taking that momentum into the Championship Stage. Following the All India Football Federation's (AIFF) directive on mandatory floodlights , RUFC will instead play their home matches over 500 kilometres away at Namdhari's facilities in Ludhiana.Returning to the ISL, Odisha FC have also had a change in its home venue. Their upcoming 'home' matches against Bengaluru FC (May 4) and Punjab FC (May 16) will be played in Goa.Varanasi-based Inter Kashi have played three 'home' games in Kolkata while their own stadium is being built; this number will increase to four by the end. Mohali-based Punjab FC have played its home fixtures in New Delhi.Amid these inequalities, the ramifications of a poor - or strong - season apply. The team that doesn't do well in the ISL will be relegated to the IFL and the team that does well in the IFL will be promoted. The relegated teams will be impacted by a drop in revenue, business opportunities, broadcast coverage, among others. Meanwhile the team that wins the title will earn higher prize money, play continental football, be able to interest the bigger talents etc.Yet, force majeure remains a hushed topic within AIFF corridors . The current AIFF Constitution, ratified by the Supreme Court, mandates promotion and relegation in India's top division. It also puts the ISL in compliance with the Asian Football Confederation (AFC) Statutes.In 2019, AIFF, clubs, and then commercial partner Football Sports Development Limited (FSDL) accepted the AFC's proposal to have relegation starting from the 2024-25 season. That promise will be kept from this season onwards.In January, all 14 ISL clubs wrote to the Sports Ministry and asked for relegation to be scrapped for the season and three to five seasons thereafter. They asked that the 2025-26 season be considered a "virtual force majeure." There has been no headway on that matter since.The FIFA and Court of Arbitration for Sport (CAS) rulings on similar cases in the past might not help the ISL clubs get away from the liability of paying salaries. But the fact that this has not been a equal season for all teams cannot be ignored.Yet, the fact that promotion and relegation will take place across India's top two divisions is a grave injustice after what the AIFF chief Kalyan Chaubey himself described as a "crisis."
Article Summary: Indian Super League (ISL) season is into its ninth matchday. Mohun Bagan Super Giant are top of the ISL standings. At the other end, Mohammedan Sporting are in prime position to go down. East Bengal have the best home record in ISL this season.

Article Title: Manchester City: Premier League: Man City crush Arsenal hopes, seize control of title race
Article Text:
Manchester City's Erling Haaland during the English Premier League match against Arsenal. (AP Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Liverpool edge derby thriller, Villa and Forest shine



Manchester City seized control of the Premier League title race with a crucial 2-1 victory over Arsenal on Sunday, dealing a major blow to the Gunners’ fading title ambitions.With the season entering its decisive phase, Erling Haaland proved the difference, netting the winner in the 65th minute after a tense and error-strewn contest. The result leaves Man City in pole position to reclaim the title, while Arsenal’s long wait for a league crown — stretching back to 2004 — looks set to continue.Arsenal had been frontrunners for months but are faltering at the worst possible time. The visitors briefly found hope when Kai Havertz capitalised on a rare mistake from City goalkeeper Gianluigi Donnarumma to cancel out Rayan Cherki’s opener. But Haaland’s clinical finish restored City’s advantage and ultimately settled the contest.In a dramatic finale, Arsenal had a golden opportunity to salvage a point, only for Havertz to head over from close range, leaving manager Mikel Arteta on his knees in frustration.The win means that if City defeat Burnley in their game in hand, Pep Guardiola’s side will go top, putting them firmly on course for a seventh league title in nine seasons.Guardiola, however, urged caution. “Momentum shifts in one instant,” he said, warning that the race is far from over despite City’s advantage.Arteta admitted his side had missed a huge opportunity. “We went very close but not close enough… we have to accept we lost a big one,” he said, while insisting Arsenal still believe they can respond in the remaining games.Elsewhere, Liverpool strengthened their push for a Champions League spot with a dramatic 2-1 win over Everton, sealed by a 100th-minute header from Virgil van Dijk.Mohamed Salah had given Liverpool the lead before Everton responded through Beto, but Van Dijk’s late heroics ensured a crucial three points that moved Liverpool seven clear of sixth-placed Chelsea.Aston Villa also stayed firmly in the top-four hunt, surviving a scare to beat Sunderland 4-3, with Tammy Abraham scoring a stoppage-time winner after Ollie Watkins had struck twice.At the other end, Nottingham Forest boosted their survival hopes as Morgan Gibbs-White scored a hat-trick in a 4-1 comeback win over Burnley, piling pressure on struggling Tottenham.
Article Summary: Erling Haaland scores winner as Manchester City beat Arsenal 2-1. Result leaves City in pole position to reclaim the Premier League title. Arsenal's long wait for a league crown — stretching back to 2004 — looks set to continue. Liverpool strengthen push for Champions League spot with dramatic win over Everton. Nottingham Forest boost survival hopes with 4-1 comeback win over Burnley.

Article Title: ISL clubs seek structured talks with AIFF, propose owners’ committee
Article Text:
ISL seek role to find AIFF’s rights partner (Screengrab)

Watch Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game

PANAJI: Indian Super League (ISL) club owners have proposed the formation of a club working committee involving the owners and decision makers, who would then engage with the federation in a “structured and transparent” manner to find the best taker for its long-term commercial rights.In a letter signed by 13 of the 14 owners, except Inter Kashi, the clubs said the group wanted to provide an appropriate platform through which ideas can be exchanged, common ground can be identified, and a balanced, sustainable, and mutually beneficial framework can be developed together.The clubs proposed three owners, Bhavesh Jindal/ Dhruv Sood (SC Delhi), Nikhil Nimmagadda (Kerala Blasters) and Rohan Sharma (Odisha FC), in the committee, while other representatives include Ravi Puskur (CEO, FC Goa), Ekansh Gupta (VP, Chennaiyin), Darren Caldeira (CEO, Bengaluru) and Vinay Chopra (director, Mohun Bagan SG).The club owners’ letter to AIFF president Kalyan Chaubey comes two days after the federation formed the ISL Governing Council and asked remaining six clubs to submit the name of their representative latest by Friday. The AIFF’s response, interestingly, came after an online meeting of all club owners just a day earlier.The club owners had little choice but join hands since the AIFF appears keen to accept the bid from Genius Sports and hand the London-based company the commercial rights of the ISL for 15+5 years. Genius’ Rs 64.4 crore annual bid, or approx. Rs 2,130 crore over 20 years with a five percent increment per year, needs an approval from the general body.The clubs aren’t happy with the rights procees and believe it’s important to engage with all stakeholders.
Article Summary: Indian Super League (ISL) club owners have proposed the formation of a club working committee involving the owners and decision makers. The committee would then engage with the federation in a ‘structured and transparent’ manner to find the best taker for its long-term commercial rights. 13 of the 14 owners, except Inter Kashi, said the group wanted to provide an appropriate platform.

Article Title: Chennaiyin beat Delhi to break home jinx; Odisha split points
Article Text:
Chennaiyin beat Delhi

Watch Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game

CHENNAI: At long last, Chennaiyin FC gave their fans a reason to cheer, breaking their home jinx in the Indian Super League this season after beating Sporting Club Delhi here on Friday.Farukh Choudhary’s 11th-minute strike handed them a 1-0 win and took CFC to eight points from eight matches, same as Delhi’s. After a bright attacking start, Farukh, receiving a pass from Alberto Noguera on the left, advanced into the box and unleashed a shot with his weaker left foot. Goalkeeper Nora Fernandes could not do much and watched it sail over him into the top-right corner.Just before half-time, defender Alex Saji denied CFC a two-goal cushion. Irfan Yadwad delivered a teasing cross from the right that fell kindly for Daniel Chima Chukwu, but just as the striker pulled the trigger, Saji from inside the six-yard box slid in to block and keep the lead in check. After the break, the home side struggled to make inroads into the attacking third in the opening 10 minutes while Delhi kept creating opportunities.Odisha FC settle for draw as Md Sp earn first point: Odisha FC’s finishing woes continued to haunt them at home as well as they were held to a 1-1 draw by wooden spooners Mohammedan Sporting Club in the Indian Super League at Kalinga Stadium in Bhubaneswar on Friday, reports Sourav Modak.For the Kolkata giants though, it was a welcome result as they brought home a point, their first in this edition following seven straight losses. The hosts had taken the lead in the 40th minute through VP Suhair while T Adison Singh scored the equaliser for MSC in the 57th minute as the game ended with scores level at the final whistle.
Article Summary: Farukh Choudhary’s 11th-minute strike handed them a 1-0 win and took CFC to eight points from eight matches, same as Delhi's. Mohammedan Sporting Club held Odisha FC 1-1 at Kalinga Stadium in Bhubaneswar.

Article Title: FIFA president Infantino confirms Iran’s participation in 2026 World Cup in USA
Article Text:
Iran national football team (Reuters Photo)

FIFA president Gianni Infantino has confirmed that Iran will take part in the 2026 FIFA World Cup despite ongoing tensions in the Middle East, stressing that football must remain separate from politics.Speaking at a CNBC-hosted economic conference on Wednesday, Infantino said, "Iran is coming for sure. We hope that by then the situation will be a peaceful situation, that would definitely help,""But Iran has to come, they represent their people, they have qualified, the players want to play," he added as the team's upcoming matches scheduled in the United States in June.Iran’s participation had come under uncertainty following the conflict involving the United States and Israel earlier this year. The team had even considered a boycott and requested that their matches be moved out of the United States, a proposal FIFA ultimately rejected. The Asian side is scheduled to play its Group G matches in the United States, two in Los Angeles and one in Seattle, while being based in Tucson, Arizona during the tournament.Tensions escalated after the February 28 conflict, followed by weeks of air strikes and retaliatory actions.Although a fragile truce came into effect on April 8, geopolitical strains remain, including restrictions in the Strait of Hormuz and US-imposed maritime measures involving Iranian ports.Infantino had made similar comments in March, when he attended an Iran-Costa Rica friendly in Antalya, Turkey, even though US President Donald Trump had previously suggested that Iranian players might not be "safe" in the United States.Despite the backdrop, Infantino reiterated FIFA’s stance on keeping sport above political conflicts. “Sports should be outside of politics. "If there's nobody else that believes in building bridges and keeping them intact and together, we are doing the job," he said.The 2026 World Cup, co-hosted by the United States, Canada, and Mexico, will be the first edition to feature 48 teams and is scheduled to begin on June 11.
Article Summary: FIFA president Gianni Infantino confirms Iran will take part in the 2026 World Cup. Iran's participation had come under uncertainty following the conflict involving the United States and Israel earlier this year. The Asian side is scheduled to play its Group G matches in the U.S. during the tournament.

Article Title: Atletico Madrid: Champions League: Atletico Madrid edge Barcelona 3-2 on aggregate to enter semis
Article Text:
Julian Alvarez of Atletico de Madrid takes a free kick during the UEFA Champions League 2025/26 Quarter-Final Second Leg match between Club Atlético de Madrid and FC Barcelona at Riyadh Air Metropolitano on April 14, 2026 in Madrid, Spain. (Photo/Getty Images)

Atletico Madrid knocked Barcelona out of the Champions League despite a 2-1 defeat in the second leg of their quarter-final on Tuesday, advancing 3-2 on aggregate.Barcelona took an early lead through Lamine Yamal and Ferran Torres inside the first 24 minutes. However, Ademola Lookman scored for Atletico, which proved enough after their 2-0 win in the first leg.Managed by Diego Simeone, Atletico reached the semi-finals of the competition for the first time since 2017.Barcelona’s hopes of forcing extra time were affected late in the match when defender Eric Garcia was sent off for bringing down Alexander Sorloth as he ran towards goal.Atletico, who have not won the competition and lost the finals in 2014 and 2016 under Simeone, will now face either Arsenal or Sporting Lisbon in the semi-finals.“(We're) very happy, knocking out a great Barca side. We had a great game away... it was really hard for us at the start (of this one), but the team knew how to get back on its feet,” Atletico midfielder Koke told Movistar.Barcelona last won the Champions League in 2015, and their wait for another title continues. Midfielder Frenkie de Jong said the team is improving despite the exit.“I think we had a very good game, we gave our lives out there, we tried everything,” he said.“I feel like luck was not on our side. We have to continue -- we're on a good path, we're growing every year.”Barcelona coach Hansi Flick started with Torres and Gavi in attack, leaving Marcus Rashford and Robert Lewandowski on the bench.Barcelona began strongly, with Yamal scoring in the fourth minute after pressing Clement Lenglet into an error. Torres later doubled the lead in the 24th minute after finishing a pass from Dani Olmo.Atletico responded in the 31st minute when Marcos Llorente set up Lookman to score.Barcelona thought they had a third goal in the second half through Torres, but it was ruled out for offside.Goalkeeper Joan Garcia made a save to deny Robin Le Normand, while tensions increased as Matteo Ruggieri was left bleeding after contact with Gavi.The match turned further against Barcelona when Eric Garcia was sent off late in the game. Flick responded by pushing Ronald Araujo forward, but Atletico held on through stoppage time to secure their place in the semi-finals.
Article Summary: Atletico Madrid beat Barcelona 2-1 in Champions League quarter-final. Lamine Yamal and Ferran Torres scored for Barcelona. Ademola Lookman scored for Atletico. Atletico advance 3-2 on aggregate and will face either Arsenal or Sporting Lisbon.

Article Title: Champions League: Barcelona eye Atletico comeback
Article Text:
Barcelona's Marcus Rashford, left, celebrates after scoring his side's fourth goal with Lamine Yamal, right, and Pedri during the Spanish La Liga soccer match between Barcelona and Espanyol in Barcelona, Spain, Saturday, April 11, 2026. (AP Photo)

Watch Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game

1ST LEG SCORES

Barcelona: Marcus Rashford had his chance against Atletico Madrid, but failed to take it — or any of the next five that came along on a frustrating European night.On Tuesday the England international has another opportunity to try and inspire Barcelona to a Champions League comeback in the Spanish capital.Rashford fired blanks as Barca suffered a 2-0 quarterfinal first leg defeat, but the England international was also his team’s brightest spark against the Rojiblancos, even though the killer finish eluded him. With Raphinha out injured, Rashford has been the natural choice on Barca’s left flank.Talented teenager Lamine Yamal was double and triple marked, in the first leg, to keep him under wraps. Atletico Madrid midfielder Koke said his team must play with “personality” to stop Barcelona mounting a comeback.“It’s hugely important to beat the press they usually put on,” Koke said on Monday. “They’re a team that presses very high, that pushes their line almost up to the halfway line that suffocates you.“That’s where our personality comes in, when it’s time to play, to want the ball, to make ourselves available, to make runs in behind.”Barcelona 0 vs Atletico Madrid 2 PSG 2 vs Liverpool 0
Article Summary: Rashford fired blanks as Barca suffered a 2-0 quarterfinal first leg defeat. England international was also his team’s brightest spark against the Rojiblancos. With Raphinha out injured, Rashford has been the natural choice on Barca's left flank.Talented teenager Lamine Yamal was double and triple marked, in the first leg, to keep him under wraps.

Article Title: Footballer dies after robbers attack team bus
Article Text:
Football (Representational Photo)

Watch EXCLUSIVE: Where did things go wrong for India in Women's Asia Cup? Aditi Chauhan decodes EXCLUSIVE: Where did things go wrong for India in Women's Asia Cup? Aditi Chauhan decodes

Poll Do you believe community support could help prevent such tragic incidents? Yes, community vigilance is crucial Not necessarily, crime happens everywhere

NEW DELHI: A Ghanaian Premier League footballer, Dominic Frimpong, has died after armed robbers attacked his team while they were returning from an away match on Sunday, according to the Ghana Football Association.The incident shocked the country’s football community and left his club and teammates devastated.The club, Berekum Chelsea FC, said in a statement that "masked men wielding guns and assault rifles" fired on the team bus and forced the players to take cover in the bushes.The attack reportedly happened around 10:30 pm local time along the Ahyiresu-Kwame Dwumor Sreso road in the Nyinahin District of Ghana’s Ashanti Region.During the chaos, Dominic Frimpong was hit by gunfire. Police said he was rushed to hospital but later died while receiving treatment.The violent robbery also affected others, including a 52-year-old victim. "Another victim, George Owusu Afriyie, 52, was also robbed of 4,500.00 cedis ($408)," the police said in a statement.Authorities confirmed the incident and described it as a criminal attack that led to loss of life and theft.The Ghana Football Association called the event "tragic" and a "huge loss to Berekum Chelsea but also to Ghana football as a whole."Frimpong, just 20 years old, was seen as a rising talent in Ghanaian football."Dominic was a promising young talent whose dedication and passion for the game embodied the spirit of our league," it said in a statement.He had joined Berekum Chelsea FC on loan from Aduana Stars FC earlier this year and had already played 13 matches, scoring two goals.His sudden death has left the local football community mourning a young career cut short in a violent and unexpected tragedy.
Article Summary: Ghanaian Premier League footballer, Dominic Frimpong, has died after armed robbers attacked his team. The club, Berekum Chelsea FC, said in a statement that "masked men wielding guns and assault rifles" fired on the team bus and forced the players to take cover in the bushes. Police said he was rushed to hospital but later died while receiving treatment.

Article Title: Manchester City rout Chelsea to close gap on leaders Arsenal
Article Text:
PTI Photo

- Cherki sparkles -

Manchester City ignited the Premier League title race with a second-half blitz that sealed a 3-0 win against Chelsea as they closed the gap on leaders Arsenal on Sunday. Pep Guardiola's side produced a devastating spell immediately after half-time, with Nico O'Reilly and Marc Guehi scoring in the space of six minutes at Stamford Bridge.Jeremy Doku wrapped up a statement victory to ensure City took advantage of Arsenal's shock 2-1 home defeat against Bournemouth on Saturday.Second-placed City are now only six points behind Arsenal with a game in hand, setting up a seismic showdown against the Gunners at the Etihad Stadium on April 19.Having beaten Arsenal in the League Cup final and thrashed Liverpool in the FA Cup quarter-finals, City are hitting form at just the right time.Their bid for a seventh English title under Guardiola appeared to be fading after successive draws with strugglers West Ham and Nottingham Forest in their previous two league matches.A disjointed first half against Chelsea suggested City might waste a golden opportunity to pile pressure on Arsenal.But Guardiola's half-time team-talk had the desired effect and City can now target next weekend's do-or-die visit from Mikel Arteta's spluttering team.If City win that blockbuster clash, they will be within three points of Arsenal, who blew substantial leads in the 2023 and 2024 title races, allowing Guardiola's men to pip them to the trophy.Arteta said the defeat to Bournemouth was a "punch in the face" and City's success in west London was another body blow for the Spaniard.City have won 29 of their 32 league games in the month of April in recent seasons, underlining their ability to thrive when the title pressure mounts.After winning their first four league matches following Liam Rosenior's arrival from Strasbourg to replace Enzo Maresca, Chelsea have won just one of their last seven, losing three in a row to leave the Blues boss facing some difficult questions.Chelsea, who haven't beaten City since the 2021 Champions League final, were again without Enzo Fernandez after Rosenior's controversial decision to drop the Argentine midfielder for hinting he might leave in the summer.Sixth-placed Chelsea looked subdued without Fernandez and they trail four points behind Liverpool in the race to qualify for the Champions League via a top-five finish.Lacking energy and cohesion in a sloppy start, City were fortunate not to fall behind when Marc Cucurella's clinical finish was disallowed for a tight offside.City also let Pedro Neto in far too easily for a stinging strike that forced Gianluigi Donnarumma to save at his near post.It took City 35 minutes to mount an incisive raid as Bernardo Silva stretched to meet O'Reilly's cross, but Robert Sanchez made a fine save from the midfielder's close-range effort.But City stepped up after the interval and O'Reilly made the breakthrough in the 51st minute.Rayan Cherki whipped an in-swinging cross towards O'Reilly and the City left-back reprised his League Cup final heroics with another clinical header from close range.Six minutes later, Cherki again showed the creative genius that has won over Guardiola despite some impetuous moments in his first season in Manchester.The France playmaker glided past a gaggle of Chelsea players on the edge of the area before threading a sublime pass to Guehi, who looked more like a forward than a centre-back as he smashed a perfect strike into the far corner from 12 yards.City benefitted from wretched Chelsea defending for their third goal in the 68th minute.Sanchez rolled the ball to Moises Caicedo even though the Chelsea midfielder was surrounded by three City players and Doku pounced, racing into the area to drill home as Guardiola celebrated a priceless result.
Article Summary: Manchester City beat Chelsea 3-0 at Stamford Bridge. Nico O'Reilly, Marc Guehi and Jeremy Doku on target. Second-placed City now six points behind Arsenal with a game in hand. Pep Guardiola's side face Gunners at the Etihad Stadium on April 19.

Article Title: Stefon Diggs’ legal battle takes new turn as s**ual assault accuser demands financial records amid defamation lawsuit standoff
Article Text:
Stefon Diggs accused of stonewalling (Getty Images)

Why is Stefon Diggs being asked to reveal financial records now?



What are the core allegations and how have they escalated?



The legal fight involving Stefon Diggs has taken a sharper turn, with fresh court filings shifting focus from allegations to evidence. At the center now is a demand for transparency. Christopher Blake Griffith, the social media personality who accused Diggs of sexual assault, is asking a judge to force the NFL star to hand over financial records. The move, detailed in newly surfaced documents, suggests the dispute is no longer just about claims and denials. It is about whether either side can prove real damage in a case that has steadily grown more complicated.Christopher Blake Griffith’s latest motion aims straight at Stefon Diggs’ defamation lawsuit. Diggs had sued him in November, arguing the accusations were fabricated for attention and caused serious harm to his reputation. Now Griffith wants proof. His legal team argues that if Diggs claims reputational and financial damage, he must show it clearly in court.According to the filing, Griffith believes Diggs is resisting that process. His attorney put it bluntly, saying Diggs “does not get to sue and hide.” The motion to compel is designed to test whether Diggs’ claims of harm hold up under scrutiny or fall apart without supporting records.Griffith also alleges the lawsuit itself is being used to silence him. In the same filing, he claims Diggs is trying to “obstruct any discovery that would test his claims,” adding that the wide receiver “can’t have it both ways.”Diggs has not responded publicly to these latest developments, continuing a pattern of staying quiet as the case unfolds.The dispute traces back to Griffith’s account of a May 2023 encounter at Diggs’ Maryland home. He alleges Diggs offered him “candy” that was actually a drug, followed by unwanted advances. Griffith described the incident in detail during an interview, claiming, “He attempted to have me unalive because of him making a sexual pass at me. It wasnt the sexual pass that frustrated me, what frustrated me the most was he tried to unalive me after it…”He further alleged inappropriate behavior, including exposure and physical contact, though no formal criminal complaint was filed over the incident. Diggs has firmly denied all accusations, maintaining that the interaction ended without issue.The conflict widened in October 2024 when Griffith filed a separate claim against Diggs’ brother, Darez Diggs, accusing him of an elevator attack meant to silence him. Around the same time, Diggs moved forward with his defamation suit, insisting the allegations were knowingly false and driven by a search for online attention.Public voices have only added to the noise. Cardi B came out strongly in Diggs’ defense, posting, “Chris lied because he was stealing and got caught.. there’s receipts for that. He lied on Gervonta Davis too and changed the story 1000 times.” The post intensified attention but did little to clarify the legal stakes.For now, the case sits at a critical stage. The court must decide whether Diggs will be required to open his financial records, a step that could shape how both sides argue credibility and damage going forward.
Article Summary: Christopher Blake Griffith wants Stefon Diggs to hand over financial records. Griffith is the social media personality who accused Diggs of sexual assault. Diggs had sued him in November, arguing the accusations were fabricated for attention and caused serious harm to his reputation.

Article Title: 2026 NFL Draft: Could Shedeur Sanders be the answer as Cleveland Browns face crucial call
Article Text:
Shedeur Sanders (Getty Images)

Are the Browns building the roster around Shedeur Sanders?



Will Cleveland’s 2026 draft picks define Shedeur Sanders’ future?



The Cleveland Browns have yet to settle on a starting quarterback, but the early signals around Shedeur Sanders suggest the franchise is quietly shaping its future around him. After a rookie season that raised as many questions as it answered, Sanders returned to voluntary minicamp this week and immediately took first-team reps. That alone does not lock in his role, but it does reveal intent. With the 2026 draft approaching, Cleveland’s next moves could say more about Sanders than any public endorsement.Shedeur Sanders’ numbers from last season were uneven. He completed 56.6% of his passes for 1,400 yards, with seven touchdowns and 10 interceptions. Those figures point to a player still finding his footing, but they do not tell the whole story. Protection issues and a thin supporting cast often left him exposed. Now, under head coach Todd Monken, the tone appears to be shifting.At minicamp, Sanders spoke openly about the change inside the building. “They’re going to understand and embrace you just as a person, and then they push you each and every day in the meeting room, on the field, in the weight room,” he said. “It’s a new vibe, a new energy.”He did not stop there. Turning toward the media, Sanders added, “We need y’all to have a new vibe, a new energy.I know y’all want us to win, so we need a winning energy here. We can’t have too much negativity going on. We want the players to be the best version of ourselves for y’all.”That confidence has not gone unnoticed. While Sanders continues to split reps with Deshaun Watson, the early workload hints at a genuine competition, not just a formality.The next step is roster support, and this is where the Browns’ draft strategy comes into focus. Speaking on ESPN, Dan Orlovsky laid out a direct path forward. “I think those two first-round pick should be left tackle and wide receiver,” Orlovsky said. “If the Browns want to truly gauge what Shedeur Sanders is, you gotta improve the protection and skill players.”Cleveland holds the No. 6 and No. 24 picks, though trade interest in the top selection remains active. Even with a move down, the team is expected to stay in range for impact offensive talent. Among the names linked to the Browns are Makai Lemon, Carnell Tate and Jordyn Tyson. Any of them would offer Shedeur Sanders a more reliable target and help stabilize an offense that lacked rhythm last season.For now, Cleveland is keeping its options open. A starting quarterback will not be named anytime soon. Still, the pattern is becoming clearer. If the Browns invest heavily in protection and playmakers, they are not just adding talent. They are setting the conditions to find out, once and for all, what Sanders can be over a full season.
Article Summary: Shedeur Sanders returned to voluntary minicamp this week and immediately took first-team reps. With the 2026 draft approaching, Cleveland’s next moves could say more about Sanders than any public endorsement. Cleveland holds the No. 6 and No. 24 picks, though trade interest in the top selection remains active.

Article Title: Mike Vrabel revisits viral moment with Dianna Russini, reveals why the situation now feels uncomfortable and serious
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel felt “shame” as he addressed reporters over photos with Dianna Russini (AP Photos)

Why did Mike Vrabel’s response signal discomfort rather than defiance?



Watch Mike Vrabel BREAKS SILENCE Following Dianna Russini Controversy | Full Press Conference Mike Vrabel BREAKS SILENCE Following Dianna Russini Controversy | Full Press Conference

What impact has the controversy had on the Patriots and Dianna Russini’s career?



Mike Vrabel spoke publicly for the first time this week after photos of him with Dianna Russini triggered days of scrutiny. Addressing reporters at the New England Patriots facility, Vrabel acknowledged the fallout without revisiting the details. His message was narrow and controlled, focused on accountability and the team. Away from the podium, though, the tone felt heavier, shaped by private conversations and a clear effort to steady the situation before it drifts further into the season.A body language review offered a window into how Vrabel carried the moment. Susan Constantine described him as “truthful and sincere,” but also uneasy. Subtle cues stood out. He rocked slightly as he spoke. His eyes dipped at key moments. There was a tightness around his mouth that suggested restraint.Constantine pointed to “genuine sadness” in his expression, noting how his lips pressed together as he emphasized certain points. It read less like a man pushing back and more like someone managing emotion in real time. Importantly, she found no signs of deception, only discomfort. Vrabel felt “shame” and “discomfort.”That aligns with the tone Vrabel chose. He didn’t revisit his earlier claim that the images showed “a completely innocent interaction.” Instead, he kept the focus inward, referencing conversations with family and the organization. “We never want our actions to negatively affect the team,” he said, adding that those discussions had been “positive and productive.” The shift in tone, from dismissive to measured, was hard to miss.The images, first published by Page Six, set off a chain reaction. Russini, then with The Athletic, stepped down before her contract expired. In a statement, she wrote, “Rather than allowing this to continue, I have decided to step aside now — before my current contract expires on June 30,” adding that she refused “to lend it further oxygen.”Vrabel declined to weigh in on her resignation. When asked if he still considered the situation “laughable,” he sidestepped. “I appreciate the question. I’m going to focus on our football team,” he said.For the Patriots, the priority is clear. Vrabel stressed development and cohesion, mentioning the integration of new players and the need to avoid distractions. The NFL, according to ESPN, is not pursuing any investigation under its personal conduct policy.Vrabel closed with a promise that felt aimed beyond the room. “What I can promise you is that my family, this organization, that the team, the staff, the coaches, everybody, our fans, most importantly, will get the best version of me going forward.”
Article Summary: Mike Vrabel spoke publicly for the first time this week after photos of him with Dianna Russini triggered days of scrutiny. His message was narrow and controlled, focused on accountability and the team. He didn't revisit his earlier claim that the images showed “a completely innocent interaction”

Article Title: Inside Olivia Culpo’s modern motherhood playbook as she quietly supports Hailee Steinfeld’s life-changing new chapter
Article Text:
Olivia Culpo and Hailee Steinfeld (Getty Images)

How is Olivia Culpo shaping the role of a modern NFL spouse?



How has Olivia Culpo supported Hailee Steinfeld through early motherhood?



When Olivia Culpo left a one-word comment on Hailee Steinfeld ’s post in January 2026, it did not read like casual celebrity chatter. “Stunning” carried a bit more weight than that. Both women are tied to NFL quarterbacks, both have lived under constant attention, and both were stepping into new phases of life. In a space often framed by comparison, the exchange felt simple but pointed. It hinted at quiet support, the kind that rarely makes headlines but often shapes how players’ partners navigate a demanding public life.Olivia Culpo’s presence around the league has evolved over time. Long before her marriage to Christian McCaffrey, she had built her own platform through fashion, business, and her Miss Universe title. That independence still defines how she shows up now.What stands out is not visibility alone, but how she uses it. Culpo has shared parts of her transition into motherhood without turning it into spectacle. There is intention in what she reveals and what she leaves out. That balance has resonated, especially among younger audiences who expect authenticity but tire of overexposure.In a league culture that once boxed partners into the background, Culpo represents a shift.She is present, but not defined by her husband’s career. She is supportive, but not silent. That distinction matters more now as the NFL’s ecosystem grows beyond the field and into lifestyle, branding, and social influence.Her approach has also nudged a subtle cultural change. There is less rivalry, more acknowledgment. Less performance, more honesty. It is not loud, but it is noticeable.Hailee Steinfeld’s entry into this world came quickly after welcoming her first child with Josh Allen in April 2026. The adjustment can be intense, even without the added glare of NFL attention. Culpo seems to understand that rhythm well.Her support has not come through long statements or public speeches. It shows up in small moments. A “Stunning” here. A “soooo good!” there. Brief, but consistent. That tone matters. It avoids overstepping while still offering reassurance.Culpo had already been engaging with Steinfeld’s posts during her pregnancy, which adds context. The connection did not start after the baby arrived. It built gradually, through visibility and acknowledgment.There is also something practical in this kind of support. For someone new to the space, seeing another woman manage similar pressures can ease the transition. It signals that the experience, while overwhelming at times, is shared.Culpo does not position herself as a guide, and that may be why the support feels genuine. It is not instructive. It is simply present.In a league where narratives often center on competition, these small interactions offer a different lens. They show how connection can exist alongside visibility, and how even a single word can carry meaning when it comes at the right time.
Article Summary: Olivia Culpo has supported Hailee Steinfeld through early motherhood. Culpo’s presence around the league has evolved over time. In a league culture that once boxed partners into the background, Culpo represents a shift.

Article Title: Tom Brady’s ex-girlfriend turns heads with striking black swimsuit look, while he predicts something big about his daughter
Article Text:
Tom Brady (Getty Images)

Tom Brady’s post-retirement life continues to draw attention, even without a snap being played. The seven-time Super Bowl champion has remained single since his 2022 divorce from Gisele Bündchen, though his name still circles celebrity headlines. From rumored links with Irina Shayk to quiet family moments, Brady’s life now splits between public fascination and personal routine. Lately, both worlds have collided, with viral social media moments and glimpses into his life as a father offering a more grounded look at the NFL icon.Why is Irina Shayk trending again amid Tom Brady links?The spotlight shifted back to Irina Shayk this week after a striking black swimsuit photo made the rounds online. The former Sports Illustrated Swimsuit cover model didn’t need much buildup. The image did the work. Fans quickly filled the comments, calling her “The best 😍❤️,” “Stunning,” and “An icon,” while others dropped emojis that said just enough.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.It is not the first time Shayk has broken through the noise with a single post. Her online presence carries that effect.There is a mix of familiarity and surprise each time, and it keeps her relevant in a crowded digital space. Her brief connection to Tom Brady only adds another layer of intrigue, even if neither has leaned into the narrative publicly.Brady, meanwhile, seems comfortable keeping his focus elsewhere. With another season as an NFL broadcaster approaching, his schedule is filling up again. Yet, away from the studio lights, a different side of him has been showing through.In a recent Instagram video, Tom Brady shared a quiet moment with his daughter Vivian. The two were outside, running through volleyball drills under the night sky. It was casual, a bit playful, and revealing in its own way. Brady captioned it, “Saturday nights with my future Olympian… I think I finally found someone who likes practice more than I did,” adding a laughing emoji.It felt less like a headline and more like a window into how he sees life now. Discipline still matters. So does effort. Those traits defined his career, and he seems intent on passing them along.Vivian, now 13, is already showing signs of athletic promise. Reports suggest she stands around 5-foot-11, a natural fit for volleyball if she chooses to pursue it seriously. For now, it is just practice. But with Brady, even practice tends to carry a purpose.The contrast is hard to miss. On one side, viral moments and celebrity buzz. On the other, a father and daughter working on fundamentals in the dark. Tom Brady has lived comfortably in both spaces for years. Now, he appears to be choosing which one matters more.
Article Summary: Irina Shayk's black swimsuit photo made the rounds online this week. Tom Brady has remained single since his 2022 divorce from Gisele Bündchen. In a recent Instagram video, Brady shared a quiet moment with his daughter Vivian.

Article Title: Patrick Mahomes takes big step in rehab as comeback journey gains momentum after serious knee injury
Article Text:
Patrick Mahomes is making steady progress in his recovery after tearing his ACL and LCL in December. He has resumed team activities like meetings and light training while continuing rehab. Although his goal is to return by Week 1, the Kansas City Chiefs remain cautious, focusing on a smart and gradual recovery process.

Andy Reid stresses patience as Patrick Mahomes pushes toward comeback

The road back has begun for Patrick Mahomes , but it is not a sprint. It is a careful climb. Just months after a serious knee injury shook the Kansas City Chiefs, the star quarterback is already back inside the building, attending meetings and working through rehab. The energy is positive, but the tone around him is measured.Head coach Andy Reid made it clear that progress does not mean pressure. The Chiefs are thinking long term. Mahomes may be one of the toughest competitors in the league, but even he cannot rush a recovery like this without risk. The focus right now is steady improvement, not quick headlines.“He goes to meetings, he can lift, do all of that, rehab,” Andy Reid told reporters. “That’s the phase he is in right now, so we will just see — play it by ear and see where he is at. He’s doing great but we just have to be smart with this thing.”That balance between optimism and caution defines the current moment. Mahomes tore his ACL and LCL in December, an injury that could derail even the best careers. Yet his early progress has given the organization hope. Reid’s message is simple. Trust the process."Every player is different. I will tell you though, I would never bet against him," Reid said."He's going to put in the time and effort and always push it but within reason, so he doesn't take steps back.""So far, it's all been positive. He's doing great."Mahomes has not stayed quiet either. He has shared glimpses of his recovery, including throwing sessions while wearing a brace on his left leg. It is a small sign, but an important one. Movement, confidence, and rhythm are slowly returning.Still, the bigger goal remains ahead. The quarterback has made it clear that Week 1 is in his sights. That is the target. But inside the Chiefs facility, there is no rush to force it. The team understands what is at stake.For now, progress matters more than timelines. And if history has shown anything, it is this. Betting against Patrick Mahomes is rarely a smart move.
Article Summary: Andy Reid stresses patience as Patrick Mahomes pushes toward comeback. Mahomes tore his ACL and LCL in December. He has resumed team activities like meetings and light training while continuing rehab. The quarterback has made it clear that Week 1 is in his sights.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Dallas Cowboys and Kansas City Chiefs linked in unexpected $6M linebacker deal
Article Text:
Kansas City Chiefs and Dallas Cowboys are linked in a trade proposal involving George Pickens and first-round picks. The deal could boost Kansas City’s offense while helping Dallas move up in the draft. However, concerns over salary cap limits and the Cowboys’ defensive needs make the move uncertain as draft strategies take shape.

Why this trade between the Chiefs and the Cowboys sounds exciting

The Kansas City Chiefs and Dallas Cowboys are both thinking about making big moves in the draft that could change their rosters. This has led to more trade talk. As the 2026 NFL Draft gets closer, teams are thinking about making big moves, and one idea has quickly become popular. It has to do with a possible trade that would send George Pickens to another team and give up two valuable first-round picks.On paper, the idea is simple, but in practice, it's hard. Kansas City would get Pickens and the No. 12 pick, while Dallas would move up to No. 9 and get an extra second-round pick. This kind of move shows that you are in a hurry, want to succeed, and are willing to take risks to make a difference right away.For the Cowboys, the reason would be clear. If they move up the board, they might be able to go after a specific offensive weapon, like Jordyn Tyson, who is said to be very high on their list. At the same time, trading Pickens could mean that there is uncertainty about a long-term contract extension. There is also a level of strategy. Sending Pickens to an AFC team lowers direct competition, which is often a factor in these kinds of decisions.Kansas City, on the other hand, would get a reliable receiver to help Patrick Mahomes . Adding a dynamic playmaker like Pickens could make an already strong offense even stronger. The Chiefs can use that along with a higher draft pick to fill other needs or boost their offensive firepower.The proposal is still not perfect, though. Kansas City already has one of the tightest budgets in the league, and salary cap limits are a big problem for them. Adding Pickens to the team could make it harder to make roster changes in the future. Dallas's biggest worry is balancing its roster. This team needs help on defense, and trading up for offense could leave important holes unfilled.The deal seems like a gamble in a lot of ways. It has benefits, but it also has risks for both sides. The Cowboys might miss out on the best defensive prospects, and the Chiefs might go too far with their money.As draft night gets closer, these kinds of ideas show how hard it is to guess what teams will do. One thing is for sure: this deal might not happen. Both franchises are trying to stay ahead, even if it means making hard and risky decisions.
Article Summary: The Kansas City Chiefs and Dallas Cowboys are linked in a trade proposal involving George Pickens and first-round picks. The deal could boost Kansas City’s offense while helping Dallas move up in the draft. However, concerns over salary cap limits and the Cowboys’ defensive needs make the move uncertain.

Article Title: "In order to be successful....": Mike Vrabel’s comments stir drama as fans suspect hidden message to Dianna Russini
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel addressed the controversy involving Dianna Russini, acknowledging private conversations with family, players, and staff while keeping key details undisclosed. He stressed accountability and avoiding distractions to the team. Meanwhile, Russini drew attention for helping at a car crash shortly after her reported exit, adding another layer to the ongoing story.

Mike Vrabel responds while keeping details behind closed doors

The spotlight around Mike Vrabel has not dimmed, even as the NFL shifts focus toward the draft. What should have been a routine offseason stretch has instead been filled with questions, speculation, and growing noise tied to the situation involving Dianna Russini. For days, Vrabel stayed quiet. Now, he has finally addressed the matter, though only to a certain extent.Vrabel didn't go into detail when he talked to reporters. Instead, he admitted that the moment was heavy and that there were conversations going on behind the scenes. His tone made it clear that he was responsible, but also that there was a clear line between public interest and private matters. The Patriots are getting ready for a very important part of building their team, and the timing of this distraction has only made things worse."Thank you for your patience that you've shown in a personal and private matter for me and obviously everybody involved," Mike Vrabel said."I know that that's not easy for you, and I respect that, and I appreciate your efforts in doing so. ... I've had some difficult conversations with people that I care about, with my family, the organization, the coaches, the players, those have been positive and productive."We believe in order to be successful on and off the field, you have to make good decisions that includes me, that starts with me.We never want our actions to negatively affect the team."We never want to be the cause of a distraction and what I was or comments and questions that I've answered for the team and with the team, we'll keep things private and to ourselves."His words point to internal reflection more than public explanation. Vrabel admitted that conversations have taken place with people close to him and within the organization. Still, he chose not to confirm or deny any specific claims tied to the situation. That decision leaves room for speculation, even as he tries to shift focus back to football.Meanwhile, Russini’s name has remained in headlines for a very different reason. Shortly after her reported exit from The Athletic, she was involved in helping at a real-life car crash in New Jersey. Reports suggest she assisted in rescuing a dog from an overturned vehicle, while another bystander helped an elderly man before authorities arrived.It is a striking contrast. On one side, a coach addressing internal matters while guarding details. On the other, an analyst stepping into an unexpected moment of action. As the league moves forward, both stories continue to draw attention for very different reasons.
Article Summary: Mike Vrabel addressed the controversy involving Dianna Russini. He acknowledged private conversations with family, players, and staff. He stressed accountability and avoiding distractions to the team. Meanwhile, Russini drew attention for helping at a car crash shortly after her reported exit.

Article Title: "Women seduced him": Cardi B and Stefon Diggs spark internet meltdown as shocking claims explode online
Article Text:
A viral post linking Cardi B and Stefon Diggs has sparked massive online reactions with dramatic claims about their relationship. The story quickly spread across social media, drawing attention for its shocking details and unusual narrative. However, there is no verified source or credible confirmation supporting the claims, leaving fans divided as the buzz continues to grow online.

Viral Cardi B and Stefon Diggs claims fall apart under scrutiny

A crazy story about Cardi B and Stefon Diggs has been going viral on social media, getting clicks and comments in just a few hours. It sounds like a shocking confession, full of dramatic turns and personal information. But this is the truth. The whole claim is false. There is no proof, no confirmed statement, and no reliable source for it.Still, the post has spread fast. That is how the internet works now. A bold claim grabs attention, people react, and before long it feels real. In this case, the story paints an unusual picture of relationships and living arrangements, all tied to high-profile names. Yet neither Cardi B nor Diggs has said anything to support it. No interviews, no official posts, nothing credible.The post reads: “Cardi B says Stefon Diggs has apologized for having 5 other baby-mamas while with her and she has forgiven hIm because unlike Offset, Diggs didn't intentionally cheat but the women séduced him 🥲Cardi says Stefon Diggs is now ”Their Baby-daddy” and they've decided to move in together with his 5 other baby-mamas so Diggs can actively take care of all his 6-kids but love only Cardi B and have nothing to do with the other 5 baby-mamas.From leaving Offset for cheating to moving in together with 5 of her new baby-daddy's baby-mamas and kids is truly an upgrade.Stefon Diggs is every woman's dream guy.. 🥲👀”At first glance, it sounds detailed enough to be believable. But that is exactly how misinformation works. The more specific it feels, the easier it is to trust without checking. In reality, there is no record of Cardi B ever saying any of this. No reputable outlet has reported it. The claims simply do not hold up.This situation is a reminder of how easily false stories can take off when celebrities are involved. People share before they pause. They react before they verify. And in the process, fiction starts to look like fact.For now, the only thing clear is this. The viral post is not real. It is just another example of how quickly misinformation can travel when attention is the goal.
Article Summary: A viral post linking Cardi B and Stefon Diggs has sparked massive online reactions with dramatic claims about their relationship. The story quickly spread across social media, drawing attention for its shocking details and unusual narrative. However, there is no verified source or credible confirmation supporting the claims.

Article Title: Josh Allen fights back tears as the Bills' QB shares a deeply personal turning point after welcoming daughter with Hailee Steinfeld
Article Text:
Josh Allen has opened up about how fatherhood is reshaping his life after welcoming a baby girl with Hailee Steinfeld. He said his drive to win remains, but his purpose has changed as he now wants to inspire his daughter. Calling parenthood a blessing, Allen praised Steinfeld’s support, while the couple shared their joy and began embracing life together as new parents.

Josh Allen opens up about fatherhood and a new sense of purpose

Life looks different for Josh Allen these days, and not because of football. The Buffalo Bills star has stepped into fatherhood, and the shift is already shaping how he sees his career and his purpose. Just weeks after welcoming his first child with Hailee Steinfeld , Allen is speaking with a new kind of clarity that goes beyond wins and losses.There is still hunger in his game. That part has not faded. But the reason behind it feels more personal now. Allen is no longer chasing success just for himself. He is thinking about the example he sets at home, and that has quietly changed everything about how he approaches both life and football.“That want to win will never change. The why I want to do it has,” Josh Allen said during offseason workouts per the Associated Press. “So why I want to do it is to show my family, to show my daughter how hard you need to work in order to accomplish something so great. And as long as I play this game, that’s going to be my mindset.”“It’s such a blessing and I’ve got an absolute rockstar of a wife,” he said, highlighting the support system that’s helping him navigate this life change.Allen's words show a change that many athletes go through but don't talk about very often.The pressure from the league is still there, but what it means has changed. Now, every practice and every game has a different meaning. It's not just about how well you do anymore. It has to do with legacy, even in its most basic form.The couple shared the news of their baby girl’s arrival on April 2, offering a glimpse into a moment filled with emotion and gratitude. “Our baby girl has arrived!! We’re feeling incredibly grateful and blessed and savouring these early moments. Thank you so much for the love and well wishes,” they wrote, capturing the joy of the milestone.Despite the sleepless nights and new routines, Allen and Steinfeld have already begun settling into this next phase. A recent appearance at a friend’s wedding in San Diego showed a relaxed, happy couple embracing both marriage and parenthood. Steinfeld later reflected on the moment, writing, “We’re getting into the swing of wedding season, huh??” She added, “This was our first time attending a wedding as husband and wife (and mom and dad!), and everything hit differently. ”For Allen, this chapter is not slowing him down. If anything, it is giving him a stronger reason to keep going.
Article Summary: Josh Allen has opened up about how fatherhood is reshaping his life after welcoming a baby girl with Hailee Steinfeld. The Buffalo Bills star has stepped into fatherhood, and the shift is already shaping how he sees his career and his purpose. He said his drive to win remains, but his purpose has changed as he now wants to inspire his daughter.
